title: 10 best herbal capsules for itchy scalp
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for itchy scalp are a natural remedy designed to soothe and calm irritated scalps. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbal extracts, such as tea tree oil, lavender, and chamomile, which work together to reduce inflammation and promote healthy skin. By taking these capsules orally, individuals can experience relief from itchy scalp symptoms, such as dandruff, flakes, and redness, leading to improved overall scalp health and reduced discomfort. For example, products like Natrol's Soothing Scalp Formula and Nature's Bounty's Herbal Supplement for Itchy Scalp have helped numerous individuals enjoy a more comfortable and manageable scalp, allowing them to focus on their daily activities without distraction.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce redness and swelling associated with irritation. The capsules also contain antioxidants that soothe and calm the scalp, alleviating itching and discomfort caused by dandruff, psoriasis, and other conditions. Additionally, burdock root's natural antifungal and antibacterial properties help to regulate the scalp's microbiome, preventing infections and promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_properties: Inflammation reduction: Burdock's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as lignans and polyphenols, help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to itching and irritation.
Antimicrobial activity: The capillary constituents in burdock have antimicrobial properties that help combat fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp, which can cause itchiness and flakiness.

Soothing and calming effects: Burdock's mucilages and saponins have a soothing and calming effect on the skin and scalp, helping to reduce redness, irritation, and itching associated with an itchy scalp.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, burdock root extract helps soothe and calm itchy scalps while promoting healthy skin.
Seeds: Burdock seeds contain essential fatty acids and vitamins that moisturize and nourish the scalp, reducing itchiness and flakiness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with itchy scalp because they contain anti-inflammatory properties that soothe irritated skin, reducing redness and itching. The capsules also provide antioxidants that combat free radicals, which can exacerbate scalp conditions like dandruff and psoriasis. Additionally, the herbs in the capsules have antimicrobial properties that help to prevent fungal and bacterial infections that can cause itchiness on the scalp. By addressing these underlying issues, pot marigold capsules offer natural relief from itchy scalp symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Pot marigold capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds like kaempferol and quercetin, which help reduce inflammation in the scalp, alleviating itchiness and discomfort.
Antimicrobial properties: The herb's antimicrobial properties can help combat fungal and bacterial infections that may be contributing to itchy scalp issues, promoting a healthy scalp environment.

Antioxidant activity: Pot marigold capsules contain antioxidants like luteolin and apigenin, which help protect the scalp from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and itchiness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm an itchy scalp.
Seeds: Contain fatty acids and vitamins that nourish the skin and hair, reducing itchiness and flakiness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chicory capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herbs in chicory, such as Taraxacum officinale, have been traditionally used to soothe irritated skin and reduce inflammation. When taken in capsule form, these herbs are absorbed into the bloodstream and can help to calm the scalp and reduce itching. Additionally, chicory has natural antioxidant properties that can help to protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, further reducing the likelihood of itchiness and flaking.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chicory's anti-inflammatory compound, sesquiterpenes, reduces redness and swelling associated with an itchy scalp, providing relief from discomfort.
Antioxidant property: The antioxidant properties of chicory help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to itchiness and flakiness.
Immunomodulatory property: Chicory's immunomodulatory compounds, such as polyphenols, regulate the immune response on the scalp, reducing inflammation and irritation that may lead to itchiness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, chicory roots help soothe and calm irritated scalps.
Barks: Containing antioxidant properties, chicory barks have been traditionally used to treat scalp conditions like dandruff and itchiness.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Horsetail capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its rich source of silica, a mineral that plays a crucial role in maintaining healthy hair and scalp. The capsules help to strengthen the hair follicles, promoting thicker and fuller hair growth, while also reducing inflammation and itchiness caused by scalp conditions such as dandruff and psoriasis. Additionally, horsetail's anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritated scalps, providing relief from constant itching and scratching. This natural remedy offers a safe and effective solution for individuals plagued by itchy scalps.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Horsetail's antioxidants help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress on the scalp, which can contribute to itchiness.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Horsetail's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and silicates, soothe and calm irritated skin on the scalp, reducing itching and redness.
Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Horsetail's natural antifungals and antibacterials help combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause itchiness, flaking, and other scalp issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are a rich source of silica, which helps to soothe and calm an itchy scalp, reducing inflammation and flaking.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain antifungal properties that help to combat fungal infections causing itchiness on the scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its potent ant-inflammatory and anti-oxidant properties. The capsules contain active compounds like anethole, which have a soothing effect on the skin, reducing redness and inflammation caused by itchiness. Additionally, fennel's natural oils help to calm and cool the scalp, relieving itching and discomfort. As a result, herbal fennel capsules can provide effective relief for itchy scalps, promoting a healthy and comfortable hair growth environment.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Fennel's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and lignans, help reduce redness and swelling associated with an itchy scalp, providing relief from discomfort.
Antimicrobial properties: Fennel's antimicrobial agents, like thymol and caryophyllene, combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause itchiness, flaking, and dandruff on the scalp.
Antioxidant properties: Fennel's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and lead to an itchy scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing inflammation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the fennel plant contain antipruritic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm itchy scalps.
Buds: Fennel buds have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat skin conditions, including itchiness and irritation on the scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with itchy scalp because they contain a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated skin. Additionally, licorice root extract has been shown to reduce inflammation and itching associated with conditions such as psoriasis and seborrheic dermatitis. By reducing inflammation and itchiness, herbal licorice capsules can provide relief from an itchy scalp, promoting a healthier and more comfortable scalp environment.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory and antipruritic (anti-itch) effects, which can help soothe and calm an itchy scalp.
Flavonoids: These compounds have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that may contribute to itchiness on the scalp.
Saponins: These compounds have antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help combat fungal or bacterial infections that may be causing itchiness, redness, and flakiness on the scalp.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are a good source of glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory and antipruritic properties that help soothe an itchy scalp.
Barks: The barks contain compounds like licoricidin and licorisoflavan A, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and itching associated with scalp conditions.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Witch hazel capsules helps with itchy scalp because they contain natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that soothe irritated skin. The herbal extract reduces redness, itching, and flaking by calming the scalp's sensitive areas. Additionally, witch hazel's astringent qualities help to tighten pores, reducing excess oil production and promoting a healthier scalp environment. As a result, witch hazel capsules provide relief from itchiness and promote a smooth, comfortable scalp.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Witch hazel's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gallic acid and tannins, reduce redness and swelling associated with an itchy scalp, providing relief from discomfort.
Antibacterial and antifungal properties: The herb's antimicrobial compounds help to combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause itchiness, dandruff, and flaking on the scalp.
Astringent property: Witch hazel's astringent compounds help to dry up excess oil and reduce itching by constricting blood vessels and reducing inflammation in the scalp.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the witch hazel plant contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm an itchy scalp.
Barks: The barks of the witch hazel plant are rich in antioxidants and have anti-irritant properties, making them effective in reducing redness and inflammation on the scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. The herb contains berberine, a compound that reduces inflammation and itching by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the body. Additionally, goldenseal's antimicrobial properties help combat fungal infections, such as malassezia, which can contribute to an itchy scalp. By reducing inflammation and eliminating fungal infections, goldenseal capsules provide relief from itchy scalp conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, and seborrheic dermatitis, promoting a healthy and comfortable scalp.
remedy_properties: Berberine: Goldenseal contains berberine, a natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compound that helps soothe itchy scalp irritations and reduce flaking by combating fungal and bacterial infections.

Isobolidene alkaloids: The isobolidene alkaloids present in goldenseal have antifungal and antiseptic properties that help combat fungal overgrowth, which can cause itchy scalps, and reduce inflammation.

Kaempferol glycosides: Goldenseal's kaempferol glycosides possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce redness and swelling associated with an itchy scalp, while also protecting the skin from damage caused by free radicals.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of goldenseal contain berberine, a natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compound that helps soothe itchy scalps.
Rhyzomes: Goldenseal rhyzomes are rich in alkaloids like berberine, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing for an itchy scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elecampane capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe irritated skin and reduce redness. The herb's natural antifungal and antibacterial compounds work to eliminate fungal and bacterial overgrowth that can contribute to itchiness. Additionally, elecampane's ability to calm the scalp and promote a healthy environment allows for improved blood flow, further reducing itching and discomfort. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Elecampane's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with an itchy scalp, providing relief from discomfort.
Antimicrobial: Elecampane's antimicrobial properties combat fungal and bacterial infections that can cause itchiness and flakiness on the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.
Soothing and Calming: Elecampane's soothing and calming properties help to reduce itching and irritation, providing instant relief from scratchy sensations and promoting relaxation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Elecampane roots are a rich source of inulin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that helps soothe and calm an itchy scalp.
Rhyzomes: The thick, underground rhizomes of elecampane contain a unique blend of flavonoids and saponins that help reduce inflammation and itching on the scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black walnut capsules helps with itchy scalp because of its anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. The capsules contain juglone, a compound that inhibits the growth of fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp, which can cause itching and flaking. Additionally, black walnut's natural antioxidants soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation. As a result, black walnut capsules provide natural relief from itchy scalp conditions such as dandruff, psoriasis, and seborrheic dermatitis, promoting a healthy and comfortable scalp.
remedy_properties: Anthelmintic properties: Black walnut's anthelmintic properties help to kill parasites, such as lice and mites, that can cause itching on the scalp.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in black walnut capsules reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with an itchy scalp, providing relief from discomfort.

Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Black walnut's antifungal and antibacterial agents combat fungal and bacterial infections that can contribute to itching, flaking, and other symptoms of scalp conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in juglone, a compound that has antifungal and antibacterial properties, making them effective against fungal infections that cause itchy scalp.
Barks: Containing tannins, which have anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, helping to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing itching and flaking.
